spacing_and_layout.navbar: sticky top-4 mx-4 md:mx-auto max-w-6xl rounded-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border border-slate-200/50 shadow-sm z-50
spacing_and_layout.general: Spacious layout, clear hierarchy, minimal visual noise, generous white space.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F4C5C] text-white hover:bg-[#0b3844] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F172A] border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:border-[#0F4C5C] hover:text-[#0F4C5C] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-[#5DD9C1] text-[#0F4C5C] hover:bg-[#4bc2ab] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-semibold transition-all shadow-sm

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E2E8F0] p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.base: w-full rounded-xl border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:border-[#0F4C5C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0F4C5C] outline-none transition-all

image_urls.description: Modern white interior with large windows and columns
image_urls.usage: Use as the background image for Login, Register, Forgot/Reset Password pages. Add a white/70 backdrop-blur overlay for readability.

image_urls.description: Abstract wavy lines in muted earth tones and blues
image_urls.usage: Use as the background or decorative element for the AI feature banner in the Dashboard.

image_urls.description: A confident businessman posing and smiling in a modern office corridor.
image_urls.usage: Use as the user profile image in the navbar and Profile page.

auth.login: Minimalist form on the right, premium architectural image on the left. Italian text.
auth.register: Multi-step or grid-based form (Nome, Cognome, Email, Telefono, Data di Nascita, Nazione, Città, Indirizzo, Tipo di Cliente, P.IVA, Codice Fiscale, Ragione Sociale).
auth.forgot_password: Clean, reassuring UI to request reset link.

dashboard.layout: Grid layout with stats cards (Pratiche, Messaggi, etc.), quick actions, recent practices table.
dashboard.ai_banner: Visually distinct block introducing the AI assistant, featuring the abstract teal waves image.

practice_management.list: Elegant data table with filters, status badges (using primary/accent colors).
practice_management.detail: Comprehensive view with tabs. Categorized documents grid, Activity log timeline. PDF download prominent CTA.
practice_management.workflow: 5-step AI pipeline visualization: Analisi -> Validazione -> Conformità -> Documento -> Comunicazione. Use horizontal or vertical progression with active states.

pages_and_features.profile: Clean settings layout to view/edit personal info, change password.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Italian language for ALL UI text (e.g., 'Accedi', 'Registrati', 'Dashboard', 'Pratiche', 'Profilo', 'Esci').
Use Manrope font for all text. Import it from Google Fonts.
Implement the floating premium navbar. It should be sticky, rounded-full, with backdrop-blur and a subtle border.
Do NOT use generic blue/purple gradients. Stick strictly to the defined teal (#0F4C5C), emerald (#5DD9C1), and gold (#C6A96B) palette.
Avoid the 'playful startup' look. The UI must feel like an exclusive European financial tool (Swiss/Milan design influence).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn').
Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for premium-looking icons. Keep stroke width thin (e.g., 1.5) for elegance.
Ensure generous padding inside cards and form elements (e.g., p-6 or p-8).
Build the 5-agent pipeline visualization using clean CSS/Tailwind steps, utilizing the gold or emerald accent for completed/active steps.
